description: The company has acquired 'QuickTunes', and their lead data needs to be merged into our main database. Merge leads from the 'leads' table in '/home/ga/Documents/databases/acquisitions.db' into the 'customers' table of the Chinook database ('/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db'). During the merge, split 'full_name' into 'FirstName' and 'LastName' (using a space separator), map 'iso_country' codes ('US' to 'USA', 'CA' to 'Canada', 'MX' to 'Mexico'), and set 'SupportRepId' to 3 for all new entries. Prevent importing any lead whose email already exists in the 'customers' table. Export the newly added customers to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/new_acquisitions.csv' (including CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, and Country) and save the migration SQL script to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/merge_leads.sql'.
